title: Insulin Tolerance Test in Mice
author: Jason Kim
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x2xfqfn

steps.title: Mice are fasted for 5 hours...
steps.instruction: Mice are fasted for 5 hours prior to the start of experiment.

steps.title: Collect plasma sample (20 µl) before...
steps.instruction: Collect plasma sample (20 µl) before the start of experiment (basal-0 min) to measurebasal insulin and glucose levels.

steps.title: Administer intraperitoneal injection of insulin (0
steps.instruction: Administer intraperitoneal injection of insulin (0.5 or 0.75 unit/kg body weight) using aninsulin syringe.

steps.title: Collect plasma samples (10 µl) at...
steps.instruction: Collect plasma samples (10 µl) at 10, 20, 30, 60, 90 and 120 min for the measurement ofglucose concentrations.

steps.title: For data analysis, plasma glucose levels vs
steps.instruction: For data analysis, plasma glucose levels vs. time after insulin injection are plotted, andarea-under-curve may be calculated to estimate insulin sensitivity.
